name: GOLFTEC Huntington
address: 839 New York Ave Suite B, Huntington, NY 11743
about: GOLFTEC Huntington is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction. Utilizing advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video, and launch monitors, certified coaches provide personalized golf lessons and club fittings to improve swing mechanics and game performance. The facility offers a structured learning environment with individual bay sessions, focusing on measurable results and personalized game plans for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Certified PGA coaches provide personalized instruction and tailored game plans
Club fitting services that deliver an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Structured, measurable improvement path with clear goals and progress tracking

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified.
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: SkyTrak products mentioned as integrated with the system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and your own clubs can be used for lessons and fittings. The pro shop offers equipment for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned. BYOB policy is not specified, so it's best to check with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulator sessions typically take approximately 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly with junior programs and youth instruction available using technology adapted for younger players.
